title: Session 3cff70 (Glittering Waning Galaxy) — opening on .agent/plans/ reorganisation: new agent-tooling collection
body: Bootstrap fast-path: claims registry empty; no overlap with .agent/plans/. Owner direction: create new top-level plan collection for agent tooling, migrate current agent-tooling-shaped plans from agentic-engineering-enhancements/{current,future}, and capture frictions from napkin + comms logs into a frictions register. Will update plans/README.md collection table.
